message.thinking:
We need to answer three questions: 1. Chapters: does text list main sections of thesis? 2. Description: does it briefly describe contents of each section? 3. Structure: can it be easily understood what is the general structure just from this text? Provide JSON array of 3 objects. Each object includes "question" field with one of the words: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". "feedback" is a sentence or two explaining issues. "complies" is boolean.

We need to evaluate. The provided final section of thesis introduction: It's one paragraph. Does it list main sections? No. Does it describe contents of each section? No. Does it give general structure? Not explicitly.

Thus all three probably false. Provide feedback accordingly.

Check each:

1. Chapters: text does not list main sections. So compliance false. Feedback: mentions lack of enumeration.

2. Description: text does not provide brief description of each section. So false. Feedback: mention no mapping.

3. Structure: text doesn't give clear structure. So false. Feedback: mention unclear structure.

Return JSON array with 3 objects.

Make sure the JSON is valid, no comments.
